info.name: Ocean Crossing
info.attribution:
Game layout, library image, and scripting by Robin Harn, released to the Public Domain under CC0.
The following graphics are from http://www.freepik.com and are used under the Freepik license:
* Crane: https://www.freepik.com/icon/crane_11100710
* Water Waves: https://www.freepik.com/icon/waves_8061665 * Coin: https://www.freepik.com/icon/coin_11280638 * Wild Card Icon: https://www.freepik.com/icon/tile_5849895
info.description: Clear the land and cross the ocean to be the first to build out your settlements.
info.similarAwards: 2016 Golden Geek Best Family Board Game Nominee
info.helpText:
* Currently this implementation supports 3p-4p only. There must be at least 3 players seated in order to see the proper resource tiles get dealt onto the board.

* Starter tiles are outlined in white. After starting the game, remove those tiles from the board and manually replace each of them with the number of resources marked on the tile.

a.textCaption: Activate any resource tile on board for free (do not collect it, and do not place a meeple)

b.textCaption: At endgame, gain 1 VP per contract you fulfilled, including this one

c.textCaption: Place a meadow tile onto any forbidden space for free

d.textCaption: Gain 2 additional action points this turn for free

e.textCaption: Remove up to 1 resource from one of your spaces on board or from your storage area

f.textCaption: Gain 1 additional action point this turn for free

g.textCaption: At endgame, gain 1 VP per unrevealed meadow tile stack on your player board

h.textCaption: Remove up to 2 resources from one of your spaces on board or from your storage area

i.textCaption: Swap 1 resource from one of your spaces on board with 1 resource from the general supply

j.textCaption: At endgame, gain 1 VP per resource tile you collected

k.textCaption: Place a meadow tile onto any hazardous water space for free

m.textCaption: Move an existing meadow tile on board to any water space for free

n.textCaption: Choose any resource from the general supply and place it onto one of your building sites

o.textCaption: Transport any resource on board to one of your building sites for free, ignoring path restrictions

objects.note: this is the card back face

b.textCaption: Choose any resource from the general supply and place it onto one of your building sites

c.textCaption: Draw a card from the draw pile and add it to your hand

d.textCaption: Remove 2 meadow tiles from your player board for free

objects.note: this is the card back face

label-guide-actiontypes.text:
Action Types (2x action points per turn):

* Activate a resource tile (1x)
* Place a building site (1x)
* Place a meadow tile onto water (1x)
* Place a meadow tile onto hazardous water (2x)
* Transport a resource onto a building site (1x)
* Complete a building contract (1x)

fields.text: You're about to reset the game. Are you sure?

thenRoutine.note: Deal each player their meadow tiles
Deal each player their meadow tiles

gameStartRoutine.note: Deal out 4 neutral contracts to the public market
